reportilo 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Getting started
    • Filling in checklists
    • Building flow diagrams
    • Exporting to Word, Excel and images
  • Changelog
  • Web app

Package index

Find guidelines

Browse and search the EQUATOR reporting guideline catalog.

reportilo_guidelines()
Browse the EQUATOR reporting guideline catalog
reportilo_categories()
EQUATOR study-type categories
search_guidelines()
Search the reporting guideline catalog
guideline_info()
Look up a single reporting guideline

Fill in checklists

Retrieve and complete a reporting checklist.

get_checklist() new_checklist()
Get a fillable reporting checklist
validate_checklist()
Validate a filled checklist

Build flow diagrams

Create and fill PRISMA, CONSORT and STARD flow diagrams.

new_flowchart()
Create a fillable flow diagram
flowchart_fields()
List the fillable fields of a flow diagram template
set_counts()
Set counts on a flow diagram
render_flowchart()
Render a flow diagram for viewing
flowchart_dot()
Build the Graphviz DOT for a flow diagram

Export

Write a filled checklist or flow diagram to Word, Excel or an image.

reportilo_export()
Export a checklist or flow diagram to a file

Application

launch_reportilo()
Launch the reportilo Shiny application

Data

Bundled datasets.

guidelines
EQUATOR reporting guideline registry
checklist_items
Reporting guideline checklist items
parse_status
Checklist extraction status
flowchart_nodes
Flow diagram template nodes
flowchart_edges
Flow diagram template edges
flowchart_counts
Flow diagram fillable counts
flowchart_templates
Flow diagram templates

On this page

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
